readme: Recommended cloud database permissions: keep writes behind cloud functions. Use the cloud console rule editor for final production rules.

collections.campus_locations: all users can read, only admins can write
collections.items: all users can read active/returned items, writes through cloud function
collections.comments: all users can read active comments, writes through cloud function
collections.thanks: owner-related reads only, writes through cloud function
collections.notifications: user can read own notifications only, writes through cloud function
collections.reports: admins only, writes through cloud function
collections.users: user can read/update own profile, writes through cloud function
